name: Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc.
summary: Overview Unless otherwise indicated by the context, all references in this Annual Report on Form 10-K to we, us, our, the Company or Prestige refer to Prestige Consumer Healthcare Inc. and our subsidiaries. Prior to August 17, 2018, the Company's name was Prestige Brands Holdings, Inc.Reference to a year (e.g., 2025) refers to our fiscal year ended March 31 of that year.
